svg.title: PathOPEN dataset workflow
svg.desc: Three-row landscape workflow. Row 1: data collection and QA generation. Row 2: PathVQA filtering and augmentation. Row 3: expert evaluation and outcome.

text.tspan: Dell Medical School · WSI scanner 1920×1200 px ·
688 correct pairs · 1,273 wrong pairs · 231 close-ended pairs
4 — Expert evaluation · 5 clinical pathologists · rating scale −1 to 2
